mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS ( user_id, terms_id, agreed_yn, agreement_action, agreed_version, agreement_channel, agreement_source, agreed_content_snapshot, agreed_at, ip_address, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{termsId}, #{agreedYn}, #{agreementAction}, #{agreedVersion}, #{agreementChannel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agreementSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agreedContentSnapshot, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT ALL
INTO USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS ( agreement_id, user_id, terms_id, agreed_yn, agreement_action, agreed_version, agreement_channel, agreement_source, agreed_content_snapshot, agreed_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS.NEXTVAL, #{a.userId}, #{a.termsId}, #{a.agreedYn}, #{a.agreementAction}, #{a.agreedVersion}, #{a.agreementChannel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{a.agreementSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{a.agreedContentSnapshot, jdbcType=CLOB}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
